title: Add footer credit for student developer Omar García Arias

requirements.summary: Add student credit line to Footer component mentioning Omar García Arias as a COBAD 35 student, styled consistently with the burgundy/white theme
acceptanceCriteria: Footer component displays a credit line mentioning Omar García Arias as a COBAD 35 student
Credit text is styled consistently with the existing burgundy/white theme
Credit appears at the bottom of the page in an appropriate position within the Footer component

file_operations.description: Add a credit line at the end of the Footer component stating 'Página creada por Omar García Arias, alumno del COBAD 35' or similar. Style the text consistently with the existing burgundy and white color scheme, ensuring it appears at the bottom of the footer in an appropriate position without disrupting the existing footer structure (school info, contact details, hours, copyright, and caffeine.ai attribution).
